commit.message:
Fix conditional sections for BSD in hotspot/cpu

Updates relevant conditional sections in files mainly in the hotspot/cpu
subtree, so that it takes *BSD systems into account. Sections that are
included for both APPLE and *BSD systems check for _ALLBSD_SOURCE, while
sections included for *BSD, but _not_ APPLE check for _BSDONLY_SOURCE.

This work is sponsored by The FreeBSD Foundation.

Co-authored-by: Greg Lewis <glewis@eyesbeyond.com>
Co-authored-by: Kurt Miller <bsdkurt@gmail.com>
